frame_analyses.description: Title slides showing 'SinaSim Laparoscopic Surgery Trainer - Essential Skills Overview'
SinaSim trainer board visible with initial object configuration showing peg setup with multiple colored objects
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Trainer board layout clearly visible, pegs arranged in standard configuration

frame_analyses.description: Right hand grasper (blue) approaching green object on left side of trainer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Operator using right hand to grasp green object, appropriate approach angle

frame_analyses.description: Green object held in mid-air between pegs, right grasper controlling object
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth transfer in progress, object positioned above pegs

frame_analyses.description: Green object being placed on right peg structure, smooth placement motion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean placement technique, object properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Peg transfer continues with final object transfers visible, multiple objects now distributed across pegs
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Trainee demonstrating reverse direction transfer with left instrument

frame_analyses.description: Final configuration showing completed peg transfer task with all objects properly positioned on pegs
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion evident from final peg arrangement and lack of remaining transfers

frame_analyses.description: Final slide showing 'For more information, visit: www.SinaMed.ir'

note_on_classification: This video is primarily INSTRUCTIONAL content. The first 3 frames contain title cards and institutional branding from Tehran University of Medical Sciences and SinaSim platform. Frames 4-7 show a simulated or demonstration performance of peg transfer task on the SinaSim virtual trainer. The video includes narrated instructions visible in frame content ('Use your left laparoscopic tool to grab the red ball and transfer it to the green ball'). The final frame contains a website reference. This is clearly an educational tutorial rather than an actual trainee performance evaluation.
cannot_score_reason: This video is classified as INSTRUCTIONAL content, not a performance evaluation. It contains:
instructional_elements: Multiple title/branding slides at video start
Narrated task instructions visible in frame overlay text

demonstrated_techniques: Proper grasper approach to objects on peg
Mid-air transfer technique using laparoscopic instruments
Hand coordination for bilateral instrument use
Transfer efficiency across the trainer field
verbal_cues: Use your left laparoscopic tool to grab the red ball and transfer it to the green ball
common_errors_addressed: Avoiding object drops during mid-air transfer
Proper placement on target peg positions

video_purpose: Educational demonstration of Peg Transfer task using SinaSim virtual laparoscopic trainer for training and instructional purposes
